entries.sentence: I wrote the answer at the top of my worksheet.
entries.chinese: answer = 答案；我把答案写在练习纸的最上面。

entries.sentence: Our teacher gave us an article about space to read.
entries.chinese: article = 文章；老师给了我们一篇关于太空的文章阅读。

entries.sentence: The new bookcase is beside the classroom door.
entries.chinese: bookcase = 书架；新书架在教室门旁边。

entries.sentence: Put the dictionary back on the bookshelf.
entries.chinese: bookshelf = 书架；把词典放回书架上。

entries.sentence: We read the first chapter before the lesson.
entries.chinese: chapter = 章；上课前我们读了第一章。

entries.sentence: My sister wants to study art at college.
entries.chinese: college = 大学；我姐姐想在大学学习艺术。

entries.sentence: This course teaches us how to write short essays.
entries.chinese: course = 课程；这门课程教我们怎样写短文。

entries.sentence: Use a dictionary when you do not know a word.
entries.chinese: dictionary = 词典；不知道一个单词时就用词典。

entries.sentence: Every child deserves a good education.
entries.chinese: education = 教育；每个孩子都应得到良好的教育。

entries.sentence: I finished my essay about my favourite place.
entries.chinese: essay = 短文；我完成了关于我最喜欢的地方的短文。

entries.sentence: The exam begins at nine o'clock on Monday.
entries.chinese: examination / exam = 考试；考试在星期一九点开始。

entries.sentence: We did a grammar exercise before lunch.
entries.chinese: exercise = 练习；午饭前我们做了一道语法练习。

entries.sentence: Please explain the question in a simpler way.
entries.chinese: explain = 解释；请用更简单的方式解释这个问题。

entries.sentence: This grammar rule is easy to remember.
entries.chinese: grammar = 语法；这条语法规则很容易记住。

entries.sentence: We learn five new English words each week.
entries.chinese: learn = 学习；我们每周学习五个新的英语单词。

entries.sentence: I got a high mark in my science test.
entries.chinese: mark = 分数；我的科学测试得了高分。

entries.sentence: Maths is easier when I check every answer.
entries.chinese: maths / mathematics = 数学；我检查每个答案时，数学就更容易。

entries.sentence: I found one spelling mistake in my homework.
entries.chinese: mistake = 错误；我在家庭作业中发现了一个拼写错误。

entries.sentence: Take notes while the teacher explains the topic.
entries.chinese: note = 笔记；老师讲解这个主题时记笔记。

entries.sentence: My notebook is full of science notes.
entries.chinese: notebook = 笔记本；我的笔记本里记满了科学笔记。

entries.sentence: Hand your paper to the teacher when you finish.
entries.chinese: paper = 试卷；完成后把试卷交给老师。

entries.sentence: Use a pencil to draw the diagram.
entries.chinese: pencil = 铅笔；用铅笔画这张图。

entries.sentence: My pencil case is under the desk.
entries.chinese: pencil case = 铅笔盒；我的铅笔盒在书桌下面。

entries.sentence: Each pupil chose a book from the library.
entries.chinese: pupil = 学生；每个学生都从图书馆选了一本书。

entries.sentence: Read the instructions before you start the test.
entries.chinese: read = 阅读；开始测试前先阅读说明。

entries.sentence: Reading every day improves my vocabulary.
entries.chinese: reading = 阅读；每天阅读能提高我的词汇量。

entries.sentence: Our group did research for the history project.
entries.chinese: research = 研究；我们小组为历史课题做了研究。

entries.sentence: I revise my notes before an important test.
entries.chinese: revise = 复习；重要测试前我复习笔记。

entries.sentence: Science helps us understand how plants grow.
entries.chinese: science = 科学；科学帮助我们理解植物如何生长。

entries.sentence: Check the spelling before you send the message.
entries.chinese: spelling = 拼写；发送消息前检查拼写。

entries.sentence: We study quietly in the library after school.
entries.chinese: study = 学习；放学后我们在图书馆安静学习。

entries.sentence: Our teacher can teach difficult ideas clearly.
entries.chinese: teach = 教；我们的老师能清楚地讲授难懂的概念。

entries.sentence: Good teaching makes a hard subject easier.
entries.chinese: teaching = 教学；好的教学能让难的科目变得容易。

entries.sentence: We have a vocabulary test on Friday morning.
entries.chinese: test = 测试；我们星期五早上有词汇测试。

entries.sentence: Open your textbook to page twenty.
entries.chinese: textbook = 教科书；把教科书翻到第二十页。

entries.sentence: He hopes to study engineering at university.
entries.chinese: university = 大学；他希望在大学学习工程学。

entries.sentence: Write your name at the top of the page.
entries.chinese: write = 写；把你的名字写在页面顶部。

entries.sentence: Write down the homework before you leave class.
entries.chinese: write down = 写下；离开教室前写下家庭作业。

entries.sentence: Use a calculator to check the final number.
entries.chinese: calculator = 计算器；用计算器核对最后的数字。

entries.sentence: We used the computer to finish our project.
entries.chinese: computer = 电脑；我们用电脑完成了课题。

entries.sentence: There is a map on the teacher's desk.
entries.chinese: desk = 书桌；老师的桌子上有一张地图。

entries.sentence: Save the document before you close the computer.
entries.chinese: document = 文件；关闭电脑前保存这份文件。

entries.sentence: Put the homework file in the class folder.
entries.chinese: file = 文件；把家庭作业文件放进班级文件夹。

entries.sentence: My keyboard is missing the letter A.
entries.chinese: keyboard = 键盘；我的键盘少了字母 A。

entries.sentence: English is the language we practise after lunch.
entries.chinese: language = 语言；英语是我们午饭后练习的语言。

entries.sentence: The teacher sent a message about tomorrow's lesson.
entries.chinese: message = 消息；老师发了一条关于明天课程的消息。

entries.sentence: Raise your hand if you have a question.
entries.chinese: question = 问题；如果你有问题就举手。

entries.sentence: The school keeps a record of every pupil's attendance.
entries.chinese: record = 记录；学校保存每个学生的出勤记录。

entries.sentence: Listening is an important skill for language learners.
entries.chinese: skill = 技能；听力是语言学习者的重要技能。

entries.sentence: Can you translate this sentence into Chinese?
entries.chinese: translate = 翻译；你能把这个句子翻译成中文吗？
